description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof, set on a rectangular green plot. The exterior features a mix of light-colored walls and large glass windows, providing a sleek and contemporary appearance. The front of the house includes a small porch area with steps leading up to the main entrance, and there is a visible outdoor patio or deck space. Several trees and shrubs are positioned around the house, adding natural elements to the urban setting. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some large picture windows and others in smaller groupings. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor areas.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large glass windows, and a mix of light-colored walls, set on a landscaped plot with trees and a patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with steps, a porch, and a patio area, as well as large windows and some landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, a long stretch of wall with large windows, and a row of trees along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying more greenery, a secondary entrance or patio, and additional windows on both stories.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a focus on the side wall, more trees, and the continuation of the flat roof and window arrangement.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with steps, a small porch, and a modern door, accented by large windows and minimal decorative elements.
